creator: uwe.pierau@tu-clausthal.de
text:
http://www.bsdfreak.org/ has no news about FreeBSD

"Thanks for bearing with us.  We have decided to retire the
BSDFreak.org website due to time constraints.  BSDFreak's staff
would like to formally thank Black Hat Networks, LLC® for the
best web hosting solutions we could find."

Fix: 

remove the link from www/en/news/news.sgml
How-To-Repeat: point your browser to www.bsdfreak.org
